name: How do they calculate lost wages for a neck injury in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: How do they calculate lost wages for a neck injury in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho lost wage benefits (income benefits) are generally 67% of your average weekly wage, subject to state minimums and maximums. You are eligible for these as long as you are unable to work or are restricted to lower-paying light duty.
